purpose: Help a potential client, partner, or external AI agent prepare a safe first brief for AI workflow audit and implementation work without sending private data.
summary_public_safe: [Describe the workflow bottleneck in 3-5 public-safe sentences. Do not include account numbers, claim IDs, private screenshots, customer records, personal addresses, private phone numbers, payment details, or credentials.]
official_or_public_links: [Official documentation, public issue, public repository, public challenge page, or public policy link]
workflow_bottleneck: [What is slow, repetitive, risky, or blocked? Keep it public-safe.]
desired_outcome: [What useful result should exist after the audit or implementation pack? Example: checklist, PR, script, QA report, evidence pack, automation design, or monitored status board.]
what_ai_can_do: Analyze public rules, docs, issues, repositories, or workflows.
Prepare a public-safe workflow map, checklist, code patch, QA plan, evidence pack, or status monitor.
Identify what information is missing and what must remain private.
what_human_approves: Approve scope, priority, and final delivery.
Operate any private account, official submission, payment, KYC, tax, identity, or signature step inside the official tool only.
Confirm any legal eligibility, residency, address, phone, device, shipping, or payout requirement privately.
evidence_gate: No value is counted until a client approval, paid task, bounty, grant, usable credit, gift card, prize, or delivered collaboration produces verified paid_or_usable_value.
next_step_after_contact_approval: After a public contact alias is approved, send only this public-safe brief first. The first-release site still does not collect forms, uploads, payments, accounts, or private messages.
